snippet.title: Rush hour riding Beijing Guomao  Sanlitun under the social control during the COVID‐19【4K】骑行在北京
snippet.description:
Try to record the real streets of Beijing. most of time, I will ride a bicycle.
In Chaoyang District, in addition to catering and supermarkets, most shops and companies are only allowed to work from home. Of course, those who cannot work from home have to stop operating, and the catering industry is also restricted from dine-in.
Shooting Date: 2022/05/16 AM about22℃

00:00:00 Route on map
00:00:34 East Third Ring Road, Changhong Bridge
00:00:59 Workers Stadium North Road
00:08:13 East Second Ring Road
00:15:34 Jianguomen Outer Street
00:23:34 East Third Ring Road
00:31:43 Agricultural Exhibition Hall South Road
00:36:45 Sweetwater Garden Street
00:41:31 Jintai Road
00:43:27 West Dawang Road
00:46:22 Jianguo Road
